lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and requires cleaning. Mechanical systems need repair to be fully functional.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor surface scratches but is otherwise well-maintained. The interior shows signs of regular use with no significant damage or stains. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the car has received regular maintenance.

Start your next adventure with this dependable ride! It's in fair condition, showing some honest character from its time on the road, but it remains a functional and hard-working vehicle. This is the perfect opportunity for someone looking for great value and a car that gets the job done reliably!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, the engine is strong and reliable, starting without hesitation and idling smoothly. The transmission shifts as it should, providing a comfortable driving experience. On the exterior, the paint still retains a nice shine, though you may find a few minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of significant wear, with all features and electronics in proper working order. It is a solid, dependable vehicle that is ready for its next owner with no immediate maintenance required.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for those seeking a functional commuter. The exterior exhibits several cosmetic flaws, including a few prominent scratches on the rear bumper and some minor dings on the side panels. The paint has lost some of its original luster in certain areas due to sun exposure. Inside, the cabin shows signs of regular use, with some thinning of the carpet and a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery. Mechanically, the car is sound and has been maintained with regular oil changes, though it may require routine suspension work in the near future. It is a practical choice for someone who values reliability over aesthetic perfection.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and consistent service history, it represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning driver who demands quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a new home! This car has been super reliable for me and is still in really solid shape. It drives smoothly, looks great on the road, and has plenty of life left in it. It's been well-loved and is perfect for someone who wants a dependable, stylish car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sound example of BMW’s S54-powered icon. The 3.2L atmospheric straight-six pulls hard through the entire rev range, aided by a precise six-speed manual transmission and a functional limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including the reinforcement of the rear subframe mounting points and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping characteristics, providing the balanced handling profile these chassis are known for. Minor aesthetic imperfections are present, but the drivetrain remains tight with consistent compression across all cylinders. A turn-key performance vehicle ready for the B-roads.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Interior clean. Maintenance current.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, attractive condition. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved daily driver. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring premium leather seating with minimal wear and a fully functional suite of technology, including a responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, the car is sound; it shifts smoothly, accelerates with confidence, and has no known fluid leaks. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, new brake pads, and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable vehicle without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This specimen has been curated to ensure a superior driving experience, balancing mechanical reliability with a sophisticated aesthetic. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking dependable quality and enduring value.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a refined balance of performance and proven reliability. Maintained to rigorous standards, it exhibits minimal wear consistent with its history and remains in robust mechanical order. A sophisticated selection for those who demand excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s in really solid shape, super dependable, and drives so smooth! It’s been well-loved and taken care of, so it’s ready to hit the road with you right away. You’re going to love how comfy the interior is—perfect for your next adventure!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, striking a perfect balance between performance and value. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, unavoidable stone chips typical of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, reflecting a history of consistent, on-time servicing. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, composed ride. With tires that have plenty of life left and a comprehensive service record, this car is mechanically sound and ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any looming maintenance concerns.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. Offering premium features and a proven service history, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking significant value without compromise.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Ideally suited for the discerning driver who values consistent quality and proven roadworthiness, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition within its class.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my absolute favorite ride, and it's looking for a new home! It’s been so well-loved and is in really wonderful shape, running super smoothly and ready for all your upcoming adventures. It’s perfect for someone who wants a reliable, comfy car that’s been treated with lots of care. Come take it for a spin—I just know you’re going to love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 remains a visceral driver’s machine, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, delivering linear power to the rear wheels via the M Variable Differential Lock. Mechanically sound, the chassis benefits from recent subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry for precise turn-in. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the compression across all cylinders
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected signs of road use that come with careful driving. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern technology, from the premium sound system to the intuitive navigation display. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly at authorized centers, with recent records showing a clean bill of health for the engine and transmission. The tires offer substantial tread life, and the brakes are responsive and firm. Whether you are commuting or heading out on a long-distance road trip, this car provides a smooth, quiet, and reliable ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. It is a solid, honest example of a well-loved vehicle that is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous inspection process, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated and dependable automotive investment.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical reliability. Demonstrating consistent care and rigorous upkeep, this specimen balances performance with long-term value. It stands as a testament to engineering excellence, prepared for immediate delivery to its next discerning owner.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for my trusty car! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in wonderful shape. I’ve made sure to keep up with all the maintenance, so it runs smoothly and looks great too. It's honestly a joy to drive and perfect for anyone looking for a solid, dependable vehicle. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat!

This 2004 911 Carrera features the refined 3.6L M96 flat-six with VarioCam Plus, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec multi-link rear suspension and upgraded Bilstein dampers. Deceleration is managed by four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors. Meticulously maintained with a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recently replaced clutch assembly, this 996.2 offers a pure, analog driving experience with exceptional throttle response and a perfectly balanced polar moment of inertia.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable transportation.

This vehicle strikes a perfect balance between luxury and reliability, presenting in impressive condition for its age. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved leather upholstery and a fully functional suite of electronics, including crisp audio and responsive climate control. Mechanically, the car is sound, having benefited from regular maintenance; it shifts smoothly, accelerates with confidence, and provides a quiet, composed ride. The tires show substantial tread depth, and the alloy wheels are in excellent shape. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for immediate enjoyment.

Presenting a distinguished profile, this meticulously maintained vehicle offers an exceptional synthesis of reliability and sophisticated engineering. It has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that balances performance with enduring value.
